title: Boat — Bayliner 2450 Sun Bridge spec sheet, Aug 2025
html:
TL;DR

  • A boat-spec dump Yahir wrote down — likely transcribing what someone (dad? grandpa Eddie?) was telling him about a Bayliner 2450 Sun Bridge Ciera they're selling.
  • Specs: Bought in California. 350 Chevy motor, two batteries, pole holders in back, ship-to-shore radio, made for deep water, full bathroom, bow has booth that turns into bed, refrigerator in bow, burner stove + sink, speakers (never even turned on), queen-sized bed with escape latch, slant door to bow, life jackets. Trailer has auto brake.
  • Owner-history: had the boat 2 years, has heart issues, didn't want to risk going.

Key data

"Had the boat for 2 years, have heart issues and didn't want to risk going."

Why it matters in the graph

  • Dated 8 days after the 2025 08 21 austin move-prep note where Yahir lists "Grandpa Eddie / Karen" in his goodbye-list. The boat-seller likely Grandpa Eddie himself or one of his peers.
  • The "heart issues, didn't want to risk going" line is family-mortality reportage — sits in the same mood-cluster as 2025 03 15 than usual recently ("my dad is getting better but I know he's gonna relax just because nothing has changed").
  • The note is almost certainly Yahir helping someone sell something — a piece of the 2025 08 21 austin pre-departure economics.

Open questions

  • Did the boat sell? For how much?
  • Whose boat — Grandpa Eddie's or another family contact?
  • Why did Yahir record specs verbatim — listing it for sale, transcribing for a buyer?

Wikilinks

2025 08 21 austin · grandpa eddie · 2025 03 15 than usual recently · yahir family · grants pass or · bridge income strategies
